name: Software Engineer
description: Design, develop, and maintain software applications and systems. One of the highest-demand and best-paying careers in India.
growth_prospects: Excellent — 20%+ job growth. High demand globally. Remote work opportunities.

roadmap_steps.title: Class 11-12
roadmap_steps.desc: Focus on Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics (PCM)

roadmap_steps.title: JEE Preparation
roadmap_steps.desc: 2 years intensive JEE Main & Advanced preparation

roadmap_steps.title: B.Tech/B.E
roadmap_steps.desc: 4-year Computer Science or IT degree

roadmap_steps.title: Internships
roadmap_steps.desc: Apply for summer internships in tech companies

roadmap_steps.title: Campus Placement
roadmap_steps.desc: Participate in campus placements (median ₹7-15 LPA)

name: Doctor (MBBS + Specialization)
description: Become a medical professional. Highly respected career with the ability to make a real difference to people's lives.
growth_prospects: Excellent — doctor-population ratio in India is very low, guaranteeing high demand.

roadmap_steps.title: Class 11-12
roadmap_steps.desc: Focus on Physics, Chemistry, Biology (PCB) — aim for 85%+

roadmap_steps.title: NEET Preparation
roadmap_steps.desc: 1-2 years NEET preparation with coaching or self-study

roadmap_steps.title: MBBS (5.5 years)
roadmap_steps.desc: MBBS degree including 1-year internship

roadmap_steps.title: PG Entrance (NEET PG)
roadmap_steps.desc: Optional but highly recommended for specialization

roadmap_steps.title: Residency & Practice
roadmap_steps.desc: Complete residency and start practice or join hospital

name: Civil Services Officer (IAS/IPS/IFS)
description: Join the elite Indian Administrative, Police, or Foreign Service. Shape India's governance and development.
entrance_exams: UPSC Civil Services Exam (Prelims + Mains + Interview)
growth_prospects: Stable, prestigious career with housing, vehicle, pension, and immense social impact.

roadmap_steps.title: Graduation (Any Stream)
roadmap_steps.desc: Complete graduation from any recognized university

roadmap_steps.title: UPSC Prelims
roadmap_steps.desc: Prepare for and clear UPSC Prelims (GS + CSAT)

roadmap_steps.title: UPSC Mains
roadmap_steps.desc: 9-paper descriptive exam covering GS, Essay, Optional subject

roadmap_steps.title: Interview/Personality Test
roadmap_steps.desc: 275-mark interview round

roadmap_steps.title: Training (LBSNAA)
roadmap_steps.desc: Foundation course at Mussoorie for IAS officers

name: Chartered Accountant (CA)
description: Become a Chartered Accountant — one of India's most prestigious finance qualifications with excellent earning potential.
growth_prospects: Excellent — every business needs a CA. High-paying, flexible work, can be self-employed.
top_colleges: ICAI (Institute of Chartered Accountants of India)
related_schemes: NSP scholarships for SC/ST commerce students

roadmap_steps.title: Class 12 Commerce
roadmap_steps.desc: Complete 12th with Commerce stream

roadmap_steps.title: CA Foundation
roadmap_steps.desc: Register with ICAI, appear for Foundation exam

roadmap_steps.title: CA Intermediate
roadmap_steps.desc: Complete articleship registration, clear Intermediate

roadmap_steps.title: Articleship (3 years)
roadmap_steps.desc: Mandatory 3-year training under practicing CA

roadmap_steps.title: CA Final
roadmap_steps.desc: Clear CA Final exam — you're a CA!

name: Data Scientist / AI Engineer
description: Analyze complex data and build AI/ML models. One of the fastest-growing and highest-paying tech careers globally.
growth_prospects: Exceptional — AI revolution is creating millions of jobs. India is a global AI hub.

roadmap_steps.title: Strong Math Foundation
roadmap_steps.desc: Excel in Math and Statistics in school

roadmap_steps.title: B.Tech/B.Sc
roadmap_steps.desc: Computer Science, Statistics, or Mathematics degree

roadmap_steps.title: Learn Programming
roadmap_steps.desc: Python, SQL, ML libraries (free on Coursera, edX, NPTEL)

roadmap_steps.title: Projects & Kaggle
roadmap_steps.desc: Build portfolio with real projects on GitHub and Kaggle

roadmap_steps.title: M.Tech/Job
roadmap_steps.desc: Apply for data science roles or pursue GATE for M.Tech

name: Teacher / Professor
description: Shape the next generation of India. Teaching is a noble, stable, and fulfilling career with good work-life balance.
required_subjects: Any stream — must specialize in chosen subject
growth_prospects: Stable — government teaching jobs offer job security, pension, and long vacations.

roadmap_steps.title: Graduation (Subject of Choice)
roadmap_steps.desc: Complete graduation in the subject you want to teach

roadmap_steps.title: B.Ed (2 years)
roadmap_steps.desc: Bachelor of Education from NCTE-recognized institution

roadmap_steps.title: CTET/State TET
roadmap_steps.desc: Clear Teacher Eligibility Test for central/state schools

roadmap_steps.title: Teaching Job
roadmap_steps.desc: Apply for KVS, NVS, or state government teacher posts

roadmap_steps.title: UGC NET (optional)
roadmap_steps.desc: For college/university teaching, clear UGC NET + Ph.D

name: Lawyer / Advocate
description: Practice law in courts or corporate sectors. Law is a respected profession with strong earning potential.
growth_prospects: Good — India's growing economy and legal system ensure steady demand for legal professionals.
related_schemes: NSP scholarships applicable for law students

roadmap_steps.title: Class 12 (Any Stream)
roadmap_steps.desc: Complete 12th. Arts/Humanities recommended but not required

roadmap_steps.title: CLAT Preparation
roadmap_steps.desc: 1 year preparation for Common Law Admission Test

roadmap_steps.title: BA LLB (5 years)
roadmap_steps.desc: Integrated BA LLB at NLU or other law school

roadmap_steps.title: Bar Council Enrollment
roadmap_steps.desc: Enroll with Bar Council of India after graduation

roadmap_steps.title: Practice / Corporate Law
roadmap_steps.desc: Join law firm, practice independently, or pursue LLM

name: Entrepreneur / Startup Founder
description: Build your own business and create jobs. India's startup ecosystem is booming with strong government support.
required_subjects: Any — business sense matters more than stream
avg_salary: Highly variable — ₹0 to unlimited. Depends on your business.
growth_prospects: India is 3rd largest startup ecosystem globally. Huge opportunities in EdTech, AgriTech, HealthTech, FinTech.

roadmap_steps.title: Identify Problem to Solve
roadmap_steps.desc: Find a real problem in your community or sector

roadmap_steps.title: Graduation + Skills
roadmap_steps.desc: Get a degree while building skills in business/tech

roadmap_steps.title: Build MVP
roadmap_steps.desc: Create minimum viable product to test your idea

roadmap_steps.title: Incubator/Funding
roadmap_steps.desc: Apply to startup incubators (SINE, NSRCEL, CIIE.CO)

roadmap_steps.title: Scale
roadmap_steps.desc: Raise funding (Mudra loan, angel investors, VCs) and scale
